$schema_doc: Phase O4-VPM-INTEGRATION Stream A.3 draft manifest. Lifecycle: Draft Manifest per VBDIP-0002A section 10. NO compiler body ships in this phase; this JSON declares the wrapper shape a future Phase O5 compiler will consume.
name: Data Contribution Receipt

consent_hash.description: Phase 237 CONSENT v1 compute_consent_hash output; binds capsule to specific consent state

gamer_address_hash.description: SHA-256 of gamer wallet address; pseudonymous identifier per GDPR Art. 17 audit posture

category_bitmask.description: 4-bit consent category mask per Phase 237: TOURNAMENT_GATE bit 0 / ANONYMIZED_RESEARCH bit 1 / MANUFACTURER_CERT bit 2 / MARKETPLACE bit 3

data_contribution_count_30d.description: Number of data buyer transactions in trailing 30 days under this consent; capsule activity signal

first_contribution_ts_ns.description: Earliest data contribution timestamp under current consent epoch

revoked_at.description: If non-zero: timestamp of consent revocation. Triggers visual_state=revoked. GDPR Art. 17 audit primitive.

buyer_attestation_chain_hash.description: SHA-256 chain over the data buyer transactions; reproducible audit trail per consent epoch

earnings_iotx_milli.description: Total earnings under this consent (milli IOTX); gamer-facing accountability signal

limitations: Per-consent-epoch receipt; covers data contributions within one consent state
Surfaces aggregate earnings + counters; does not expose individual data buyer identities
On consent revocation: capsule renders visual_state=revoked + GDPR Art. 17 banner

references.registry: VBDIP-0002A section 10 row 5 (CONSENT-CAPSULE-v1 / Data Contribution Receipt / Gamers + Data Buyers / Reserved)

promotion_rules.to_compiler_target: Author scripts/vpm_compile_consent_capsule.py with build_consent_capsule_artifact(...). Must implement GDPR Article 17 revocation semantic: revoked_at != 0 forces visual_state=revoked and surfaces the redacted banner per scripts/vpm_visual_grammar.py.
promotion_rules.to_test_fixture: Add bridge/tests/test_phase_o5_vpm_consent_capsule.py with T-VPM-CC-1..10 + T-VPM-GRAMMAR x6 + GDPR Art. 17 semantic invariant test mirroring T-ZKBA-CONSENT-10 (commit 9bfa981e).
promotion_rules.to_active: Operator governance ceremony. Requires gamer-self-sovereignty audit flow (gamer can view their own capsule without operator intervention) + data-buyer audit interface before Active status.

non_authoritative_notes: This draft manifest is documentation-only. It does not grant runtime authority. The capsule wraps the Phase 237 CONSENT v1 primitive output + Phase O3 CONSENT Receipt Card (commit 9bfa981e); promotion requires those upstream primitives remain unchanged.
